entries.description: Tier-0 DNS resolver IP list. JSON array of IPv4 addresses. Cannot use DNS to discover DNS.
entries.invariants: No loopback addresses; must contain at least one reachable IP; written during bootstrap and node-join

entries.description: MinIO connection config. JSON with endpoint, access_key, secret_key, secure, bucket, prefix. Single source of truth for all MinIO clients.
entries.invariants: Endpoint is a DNS name (never IP); credentials must be valid; written during bootstrap and minio-pool changes

entries.description: Public directory registry. Marks filesystem paths as publicly accessible without authentication. Read by gateway for access control.
entries.invariants: Paths must be absolute; only the file service writes entries

entries.description: Tier-0 ScyllaDB seed IP list. JSON array of IPv4 addresses. Used by all ScyllaDB clients to bootstrap CQL connections.
entries.invariants: No loopback addresses; must contain at least one reachable seed; written during bootstrap and scylla-join

entries.description: Remediation audit trail. One record per execution attempt with action type, risk, outcome, and subject. TTL 30 days.
entries.invariants: Immutable after write; TTL-leased in etcd (30 days); never blocked by audit write failure

entries.description: Authoritative cluster state: nodes, join tokens, MinIO pool, network spec.
entries.invariants: Single-writer; local disk copy is a backup only; persistStateLocked is the ONLY write path.

entries.description: Per-node installed-package record — one entry per (node, kind, name) tuple.
entries.invariants: Written only after a successful install/upgrade/remove lifecycle transition; deleted by DeleteInstalledPackage or node cleanup; kind MUST be one of SERVICE|INFRASTRUCTURE|COMMAND.

entries.description: Cluster-wide desired version for an INFRASTRUCTURE-kind package (etcd, minio, scylla, etc.).
entries.invariants: Only set for packages with kind=INFRASTRUCTURE; publisher segment identifies the artifact namespace; status.phase drives the rollout workflow.

entries.description: Cluster install policy: which publishers/namespaces are trusted for artifact resolution.
entries.invariants: Evaluated during release resolution; verified_publishers_only + allowed_namespaces AND-intersect.

entries.description: Cluster-wide desired version for a SERVICE-kind package.
entries.invariants: Only set for packages with kind=SERVICE; version MUST be present in the repository catalog; meta.generation monotonically increases.

entries.description: Per-service configuration. JSON with Name, Port, Protocol, TLS, Address, etc. Written by node-agent during install; read by gateway/xDS for routing.
entries.invariants: One config per service per cluster; Address must be routable; Port must be in range

entries.description: Per-node service instance registration. JSON with node-specific address, port, process ID. Written by node-agent on service start; read by gateway/xDS for load balancing.
entries.invariants: One instance per (service, node); stale instances cleaned up on node removal

entries.description: Service runtime state. JSON with process status, last restart, health check results. Watchable key for live status updates.
entries.invariants: Updated on service start/stop/restart; stale entries indicate node-agent failure

entries.description: Phase 1 projection: 'who is this node?' — minimal identity row derived from controllerState.Nodes.
entries.invariants: Best-effort projection (Clause 3 fallback); reverse-lookup tables (by_hostname/by_mac/by_ip) point at this row; reconciler rebuilds every 5 min.
